title: ilauke Artificial Pink Roses, 30Pcs Foam Flowers with Stems and Card, Real Touch for Wedding Bouquets, Party Table Centerpieces, Home Decorations
features: Great Value - You will get 30 artificial roses and a greeting card. Each fake rose head approaches 3.2 inches, Perfect for Wedding Decoration. Improved Packaging, you will receive more perfect handmade flowers!
description: Product Description Bring beauty and everlasting charm into your life with these exquisite artificial flowers roses These realistic fake flowers are perfect for home decor and weddings. Whether you're looking to enhance your living room, bedroom, or office, these artificial roses can add a touch of elegance to your space, which are sure to impress. The artificial pink roses are crafted from high-quality latex foam, providing a soft-touch and realistic appearance. These faux roses are versatile and can be used for various purposes such as wedding decorations, DIY flower arrangements, and adding a touch of elegance to any space.
